ShortDescription.Value: Live city JSON export for the CitiesAI advisor. Read-only — writes local files only, no simulation changes.

Publish.LongDescription:
CitiesAI turns live simulation data into plain advice about your city.
This mod does not change simulation, economy, or saves. It only writes files under your ModsData folder. Nothing else is manipulated or uploaded.
While a city is loaded, you get an updated latest.json with population, treasury, budget, wellbeing, traffic, transit lines, service pressure, housing and labor signals, RCI demand factors, power and garbage coverage, and more every 5 seconds.
**Features** * Mayor's Briefing at session start — what changed since you last played, what to fix first * Next Line Advisor — suggests where your next transit line should go * Issue lifecycle — tracks city pressures across sessions and highlights what you fixed * Dashboard and Insights — letter grades, grade history, transit doctor, access gaps, power card * Ask tab — optional AI answers with your own free Mistral API key (stats work without a key) * Alerts center — desktop notifications for recurring city pressures
**Requirements** * Cities: Skylines II (Steam or Xbox PC) * Windows 10/11 * Optional: API key for Ask tab AI answers (Mistral provides for free)
Default export folder: %USERPROFILE%\AppData\LocalLow\Colossal Order\Cities Skylines II\ModsData\CS2DataExport

ChangeLog.Value: Fix expected round-trip time minutes (ticks×1440/ticks_per_day; was ~60× too high).
